modeling_constraints: Do not hard-code validation stimulus, stop times, sample windows, gold internals, or simulator side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: Each rising `clkin` crossing through 0.5 V toggles the retained divider state.
The retained state and `clkout` start low before the first input-clock edge.
`clkout` drives 0.9 V for high state and 0.0 V for low state without amplitude scaling.

title: Divide By Two Toggle
